From: "Cecile de Jongh" <ceciledejongh@yahoo.com>
Subject: FW:
Date: Thu, 19 Jun 2008 22:21:28 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com



-----Original Message-----
From: "Susan Penn" <susan@penn.vi>
To: "Cecile de Jongh" <ceciledejongh@yahoo.com>
Sent: 6/19/08 3:18 PM
Subject: 

Hi Cecile,
 
   Hope all is well.  Will be back in the swing of things, the girls leave 
on Saturday.  It was truly a nice experience.  keionna ask that you tell 
Julian good-bye for her.  Hopefully, we can do some catching up.  Minister 
Walker has asked me if we had forgotten her visit.  Tamara told me what a 
very nice person you are, she had a wonderful chat with you Thank you.
 
    Commissioner Mathes asked me to send you this attachment. 
 
                                                                             
                          Take care,
 
                                                                             
                           Susan

From: "Peg Ugland" <pegu@naproperty.com>
Subject: FW:
Date: Fri, 07 Dec 2007 17:32:17 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

I don't know of any connection to Mellon Bank, do you?

 

From: Matthew S. Zeiger [mailto:zeigerm@litohio.com] 
Sent: Friday, December 07, 2007 8:03 AM
To: Peg Ugland
Subject: 

 

Peg,

 

I understand that the Agenda was amended last evening during committee
meetings to include an item related to Mellon Bank.  I am told that Mr.
Wexner expressed that he was not sure if he had an interest in Mellon Bank
or not, so I thought I would check with you.

 

Please let me know what you find out.

 

Regards,

 

Matt
